active.name: filesystem
active.purpose: Safe workspace file access for memory and Harness files.

active.name: playwright
active.purpose: Browser automation for L3 smoke tests and UI inspection.

optional.name: inspectr
optional.purpose: Local API mock and traffic inspection. Use `npm run harness:mock`.

optional.name: imap-mini
optional.purpose: Isolated IMAP sandbox for mail parsing tests.

optional.name: agentops
optional.purpose: Agent trace and routing observability after multi-agent workflows are active.

optional.name: sentry
optional.purpose: Read Sentry issues and stack traces for failure recovery.

deferred.name: mockloop
deferred.reason: No verified local package was found during setup. Inspectr is the default mock layer for now.
